meta.title: World in Danger: A Conversation on the Future of Europe with Ambassador Wolfgang Ischinger
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Ambassador Wolfgang Ischinger, author of the recently published World in Danger: Germany and Europe in an Uncertain Time. Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Walter Russell Mead will moderate the conversation.
